task_completion.description: Set the Application Title to 'Sierra Leone HMIS'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field in the DHIS2 settings (likely under Appearance or General) labeled 'Application Title' containing exactly 'Sierra Leone HMIS'.

task_completion.description: Set the Application Introduction to the specified welcome message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text area or input field labeled 'Application Introduction' containing the text: 'Welcome to the Sierra Leone Health Information Management System. This platform is managed by the Ministry of Health and Sanitation for authorized health personnel only.'

task_completion.description: Set the Application Notification to the specified maintenance message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field labeled 'Application Notification' containing the text: 'System maintenance is scheduled for the last Sunday of each month from 22:00 to 02:00 GMT.'

task_completion.description: Set the Max number of analytics records to 100000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a numeric input field labeled 'Max number of analytics records' (or similar analytics limit setting) containing the value '100000'.

task_completion.description: Set the Application Footer to the specified copyright message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text input field labeled 'Application Footer' containing the text: '© 2024 Ministry of Health and Sanitation, Sierra Leone'.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the DHIS2 interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating the DHIS2 web application, not a terminal window executing API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine DHIS2 System Settings interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should look like a real DHIS2 settings page (typically the 'System Settings' app), not a generic text editor or a locally created fake HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save' button being clicked, a success notification/toast, or the settings persisting on the screen after being entered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target values to verify: Title: 'Sierra Leone HMIS'. Intro: 'Welcome to the Sierra Leone Health Information Management System. This platform is managed by the Ministry of Health and Sanitation for authorized health personnel only.'. Notification: 'System maintenance is scheduled for the last Sunday of each month from 22:00 to 02:00 GMT.'. Analytics Limit: '100000'. Footer: '© 2024 Ministry of Health and Sanitation, Sierra Leone'.
